title: ctenitis sphaeropteroides
intro: Ctenitis sphaeropteroides, also known as the rounded-leaved fern or Taiwan round-leaved fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Ctenitis sphaeropteroides have been attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, providing health benefits such as anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. Ctenitis sphaeropteroides can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
